<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Vortioxetine 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of major depressive episodes in adults.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>endogenous depression（99.5%）</li>
<li>anxiety disorder（99.4%）</li>
<li>neurotic disorder（99.2%）</li>
<li>major depressive disorder（99.2%）</li>
<li>neurotic depression（99.1%）</li>
<li>melancholia（99.1%）</li>
<li>benign paroxysmal torticollis of infancy（99.1%）</li>
<li>unipolar depression（99.0%）</li>
<li>dysthymic disorder（99.0%）</li>
<li>agoraphobia（99.0%）</li>
<li>Ohdo syndrome and variants（98.7%）</li>
<li>Keppen-Lubinsky syndrome（98.5%）</li>
<li>blepharophimosis - intellectual disability syndrome, Ohdo type（98.3%）</li>
<li>congenital isolated adrenocorticotropic hormone deficiency (disease)（97.9%）</li>
<li>ligneous conjunctivitis（97.8%）</li>
<li>autosomal dominant slowed nerve conduction velocity（97.7%）</li>
<li>vitamin B12-responsive methylmalonic acidemia（96.9%）</li>
<li>phobic disorder（95.8%）</li>
<li>childhood apraxia of speech（95.3%）</li>
<li>surfactant metabolism dysfunction, pulmonary（94.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
